message:
feat(harness): add key event logging for debugging input handling

Add optional key event logging to the test harness, controlled by the
FTUI_HARNESS_LOG_KEYS environment variable. When enabled (=1 or =true),
all key events are logged to the log viewer panel with details:

- Key code (e.g., Char('a'), Enter, Escape)
- Event kind (Press, Release, Repeat)
- Modifier state (shift, alt, ctrl, super)

This is invaluable for debugging:
- Kitty keyboard protocol issues
- Modifier key combinations
- Key repeat behavior
- Understanding what the terminal is actually sending

Implementation:
- Add log_keys field to AgentHarness struct
- Add format_modifiers() helper to stringify Modifiers bitflags
- Log events in handle_key() before filtering to Press-only
- Parse FTUI_HARNESS_LOG_KEYS at startup

Usage:
  FTUI_HARNESS_LOG_KEYS=1 cargo run -p ftui-harness

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
